UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Chariot card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Chariot card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Chariot card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Chariot card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Chariot card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Chariot card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the strategic wisdom of Athena, her guidance towards victory, and the dynamic journey symbolized by the sphinxes and charioteer.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the physical aspects such as the city gates or the detailed feathers and scales.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Chariot card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, horns, harp, uplifting, triumphant, majestic, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Chariot card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Chariot card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the uncontrolled aggression, chaos, and impending danger represented by Ares in reversed The Chariot.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the control or guidance aspect of this card as it is reversed.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Chariot card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, reversed, introspective, contemplative, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Chariot card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Chariot card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the determination and leadership of Jason as he steers his Argonauts through conflicting forces, symbolizing the journey's challenges and his resolve to overcome them.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the strain or struggle, instead focus on the sense of progress and victory as the storm clears and the golden fleece quest continues.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Chariot card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, harp, strings, trumpet, triumphant, majestic, uplifting, instrumental
